name: Not Not
author: Poki
description: The ultimate brain-busting challenge has arrived! Not Not is a puzzle game where you use your logic and orientation to swipe your character towards the correct direction (up, down, left or right) and to victory. As you reach higher levels in the game, increasingly complex and varied instructions will require use of both your logic and dexterity for you to succeed. Are you ready to push the limits of your brain? How do I play Not Not? Follow the instructions on the screen on what (not) to do. Use the keyboard keys (arrow or WASD) or swipe with the mouse in the correct direction! Who created Not Not? Not Not is created by Alt Shift. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Not Not for free? You can play Not Not for free on Poki. Can I play Not Not on mobile devices and desktop? Not Not can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
